decisions.rationale: Observation resolves to its own base_record_id corridor_queensboro-bridge-qbb which already exists in the registry, confirming same source (201110_qbb_summary_recommendations), same corridor name (Queensboro Bridge), same boroughs (Manhattan, Queens), and same description (major bus corridor with 16,000 daily trips). Decision is new per canonicalization rules: the closest registry match is the observation's own base_record_id, so new is the correct decision.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The QBB is a major bus corridor – 16,000 bus trips a day – 110 buses during PM rush hour – Local service between Manhattan and Queens

proposed_relations.description: Both records refer to the same real-world Queensboro Bridge bus corridor connecting Manhattan and Queens, carrying ~16,000 bus trips daily
